title: Magnificently Crunchy Portuguese Milk Frittata
description: A floral and crunchy Portuguese dish featuring milk, perfect for a special occasion, this ovo-vegetarian friendly frittata is a show stopper.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, melt the butter over medium heat and saute the chopped onion until translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute, until fragrant.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, milk, salt, and pepper until well combined.
Add the chopped parsley to the egg mixture and stir to combine.
Pour the egg mixture over the cooked onion and garlic in the skillet.
Sprinkle the crushed crackers over the top of the egg mixture for added crunch.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 25 minutes, or until the eggs are set.
Remove the skillet from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before slicing and serving.
